socialMediaContent.content:
🧠 The AI Prompt Formula:

[CONTEXT] + [TASK] + [CONSTRAINTS] = Perfect Output

Example:
"You're a marketing consultant for SaaS startups. Write 3 email subject lines that increase open rates by 25%. Focus on urgency and curiosity."

This simple framework solves 90% of prompting problems.

#AIPrompting #ProductivityTips

⏱️ AI Time-Saver: Batch Processing

Instead of 10 separate prompts, try:

"Generate 10 LinkedIn post ideas about remote work for tech professionals. Include a hook, 3 key points, and a CTA. Number them 1-10."

Batch = 10x faster results.

#AIProductivity #TimeManagement

🔄 AI Feedback Loop:

1. Ask AI to draft something
2. Review and edit
3. Show AI your edited version
4. Ask for improvements
5. Repeat until perfect

This iterative process creates 10x better results than accepting first drafts.

#AIWorkflow #ContinuousImprovement

🎯 AI for Solopreneurs:

Use AI to:
• Draft client emails (save 30 mins/day)
• Create content calendars (save 2 hrs/week)
• Research competitors (save 5 hrs/month)
• Write product descriptions (save 10 hrs/month)

That's 60+ hours/year back to growing your business.

#SolopreneurLife #AIForBusiness

🔍 AI Quality Check:

Before hitting send, ask AI:

"What's unclear in this draft?"
"Who might misunderstand this?"
"What assumptions did I make?"
"How could this be misinterpreted?"

This simple QA process prevents embarrassing mistakes.

#AIBestPractices #QualityControl
